name: vault
description: Raw-first Obsidian vault manager. Capture directly into raw/sources, curate linked notes, and maintain index/log.

interface.longDescription: Operate an Obsidian vault with immutable raw sources, curated wiki notes, and index/log maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a raw-first vault structure in this folder.
Process source captures from raw/sources into curated linked notes.
Refresh index and append a structured operation log entry.
